status: height: 50px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0 28px 0 24px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text);
avatar: width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--forest); color: var(--bright); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-weight: 800; font-size: 14px; flex-shrink: 0;
hero: background: var(--forest-hover); border-radius: 20px; padding: 22px; box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(14,34,0,0.25);
hero-label: font-size: 11px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.6px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--bright); margin-bottom: 6px;
hero-total: font-size: 38px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.6px; color: #FFF; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
hero-add: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-top: 12px; color: var(--bright); font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600;
qa: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
qa-circle: width: 50px; height: 50px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--surface); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
crow: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; height: 64px; padding: 0 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--divider);
flag: width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--surface); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 17px; flex-shrink: 0;
crow-bal: font-size: 22px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
tab: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; gap: 3px; position: relative;
